expectations.text: Mentions App Connection as a prerequisite for the sync
expectations.evidence: Never explicitly mentions 'App Connection'. Instead discusses 'AWS Integration' and 'AWS connection' but not the Infisical-specific 'App Connection' concept

expectations.text: Correctly identifies mapping behavior options (one-to-one vs many-to-one) which is specific to AWS SM
expectations.evidence: The response discusses 'Destination Secret Name' as a path prefix (e.g., 'infisical/my-app/') but does not mention one-to-one vs many-to-one mapping behavior as AWS SM-specific options

expectations.text: Recommends or mentions Key Schema for scoping managed secrets
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Destination Secret Name' with path prefix approach, but does not mention 'Key Schema' template or the INFISICAL_{{secretKey}} pattern

expectations.text: Explains initial sync behavior options (overwrite vs import)
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'Sync Behavior' (Automatic/Manual) but does not discuss initial sync behavior options like 'overwrite vs import'

expectations.text: Mentions region configuration for the AWS destination
expectations.evidence: "AWS Region: us-east-1" is mentioned in the configuration section

expectations.text: References auto-sync capability (secrets propagate on change)
expectations.evidence: "Automatic Syncing: If you enabled automatic sync, any changes to secrets in Infisical will push to AWS SM"
